modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to launch Transact system due to Web API error.

full_description_text: The user is experiencing an issue when trying to launch the Transact system. They receive an error message stating that it is unable to communicate with the Web API server. The FQDN for the Web API server seems valid, but the service may not be running. This is preventing access to the system.
short_description: Unable to launch Transact system due to Web API error.
description: The user is experiencing an issue when trying to launch the Transact system. They receive an error message stating that it is unable to communicate with the Web API server. The FQDN for the Web API server seems valid, but the service may not be running. This is preventing access to the system.
